name: Instacart (Maplebear Inc.)
one_liner: Instacart is a grocery technology company that connects consumers with retailers for same-day delivery and pickup, while providing retailers with enterprise e-commerce, fulfillment, advertising, and in-store technology solutions.

ambiguities: Headcount figures vary significantly across sources: Tracxn reports 3,265 (Dec 2024), Owler ~3,600, Bitscale 2,875 (Nov 2025), Unify 10,706 (Oct 2025, likely includes gig shoppers), and LeadIQ ~23K (likely includes all contractor shoppers). The 3,265 figure from Tracxn is used as the best proxy for full-time employees only.
Total pre-IPO funding of ~$2.93B per multiple sources; Owler cites $3.6B possibly including IPO proceeds.
IPO in September 2023 raised $660M at $30/share on NASDAQ; post-IPO funding rounds are not separately tracked as the company is now public.
Market cap as of May 2026 is approximately $9.4B based on Robinhood data.
